temporal_description: A medium shot captures a man in a white shirt and black tie standing in a dimly lit, modern-looking room. He has a serious expression and his hands are on his hips. In the foreground, the back of another person's head is visible, looking towards a television screen. The TV displays a security camera feed of a hallway, with a timestamp at the bottom reading "16:14". In the background, through a glass partition, other people can be seen moving in an office-like space. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is present in the upper left corner. The camera remains steady, focusing on the man in the white shirt. A man speaks in a calm, professional, and slightly authoritative tone, as if giving a report or instructions. His voice is steady and clear, with a measured pace. "凶徒20分钟后到的。" The camera angle shifts to a close-up, over-the-shoulder view of the person in the foreground. We see the side of their face as they look at the man in the white shirt, who is now out of focus in the background. The man in the white shirt continues to stand with his hands on his hips, maintaining his stern demeanor. The security camera footage on the TV is still visible. The "风行网" watermark remains in the upper left. "在4点30..." The audio is quiet, with no background music or significant sound effects, placing all the focus on the spoken dialogue. The camera pans slightly to the right, showing more of the person in the foreground as they gesture with their hand. The man in the white shirt is now more out of focus on the right side of the frame. The shot is tight and slightly shaky, emphasizing the interaction between the two individuals.
